2025-12-04T15:06:48.150Z Mesa AZ – Commercial Building Permits (JSON) PMT25-21630 9560 E PECOS RD 0 An At-risk grading permit can be requested to start grading work prior to construction permit issuance and approval from the Civil division. However, NO work besides grading can be done with an at-risk grading permit. No structures, piping, trenching, etc. may be constructed under the AR permit. Additionally, no utilities can be installed with an at-risk grading permit. ADEQ NOI and Maricopa County Dust Control permit, and the contractor verification form are required. This project is an approximate 50.5-arcre development consisting of 1 industrial building with associated truck and vehicular parking.
2025-12-04T15:06:48.134Z Mesa AZ – Commercial Building Permits (JSON) PMT25-11133 5000 E MCDOWELL RD 4073640 Tenant improvement in existing 158,529 SF, type II-B construction, F1, B and S1 occupancy warehouse to add 4,000 Sf, group B occupancy office mezzanine. Mezzanine to have Open office space, room for conferences and office, (2) stair access with (1) access to mezzanine hard lid that house new mechanical units, and electrical scope for lighting and power. No additional plumbing fixture required. Special inspection req. - steel, concrete, Deep foundations. Deferred submittal - steel joist. Deferred fire sprinklers and fire alarms. Results in CoO.
2025-12-04T15:06:48.117Z Mesa AZ – Commercial Building Permits (JSON) PMT25-18575 5000 E MCDOWELL RD 0 DESIGN FOR A NEW FALCON2 MEDIUM VOLTAGE SWITCHGEAR FOR THE NEW SRP TRANSFORMER. THE NEW SWITCHGEAR WILL PROVIDE THE POWER FEED FOR THE NEW ACA PHASE 2 AND PHASE 3 ADDITION.
2025-12-04T15:06:48.100Z Mesa AZ – Commercial Building Permits (JSON) PMT25-15563 810 W MAIN ST 30511 Remove and replace approx. 20 linear feet of exterior CMU wall from vehicle impact damage. New wall to match existing materials, finish and construction. Special inspection req. masonry (reinforcement, grout and epoxy rebar). REF: COB25-00171. Approved with comments. Results in CoC.
2025-12-04T15:06:48.081Z Mesa AZ – Commercial Building Permits (JSON) PMT24-03188 3223 S CRISMON RD 145 6747832.41 T.I. / office spec suite and warehouse cooling only. No C of O, only C of C. No tenant this permit. Future tenant to submit new permit for C of O. New office, restrooms, breakroom, new roof top units and associated mechanical, electrical and plumbing. Deferred fire sprinklers and fire alarms. Occupancy classifications B, S-1, construction type VB. EXPEDITE-
2025-12-04T15:06:48.065Z Mesa AZ – Commercial Building Permits (JSON) PMT25-18450 2862 N 58TH CIR 101 3874327.04 Tenant improvement at existing 17,952 SF, type VB construction, B occupancy suite for physical training. Modifications include new interior walls to create a Physical Therapy room and janitors closet. Warehouse area will include batting cage area and various athletic training areas. Existing spec office includes (4) ADA restroom, office areas and exits with no change. Modifications include new ductwork to serve new room with existing RTUs, and electrical circuit revisions at existing panels. REF: PMT25-20612 Code Mod for plumbing fixture. Approved with comments. Deferred fire sprinklers and fire alarm. Results in CoO.
2025-12-04T15:06:48.046Z Mesa AZ – Commercial Building Permits (JSON) PMT25-11726 6306 S MOUNTAIN RD 22899072.73 Development of new 175,852 SF, type VB construction, group M and S-1 with A, B and F-1 accessory occupancy, single story Walmart Supercenter with a 992 SF Pharmacy Drive-thru canopy. Special inspection req. - steel, concrete, masonry, soils, fabricated items. Type 1 Hood to use manufacture pre-built ductwork. Water meter captured in civil permit. Hood AFES is included in this permit. Deferred fire sprinklers diesel drive fire pump, High-Piled Combustible Storage, fire alarm and HMIS. Fuel Center by separate permit. Special inspection required for structural items and Emergency Responder Radio Coverage IFC 510. REF: PMT25-11308 Civil Site improvements. Results in CoO.
2025-12-04T15:06:48.029Z Mesa AZ – Commercial Building Permits (JSON) PMT25-21864 4140 S SIGNAL BUTTE RD 0 AT-RISK GRADING PERMIT TO BEGIN SITE GRADING PRIOR TO BUILDING PERMIT APPROVAL. THIS PERMIT IS FOR GRADING ONLY AND DOES NOT INCLUDE ANY UTILITY OR OTHER WORK. REFERENCE PERMIT PMT25-15683
